item.title: Prarthana Industries — Manufacturer & Exporter of Transmission Products
item.description: Prarthana Industries — Manufacturer and Exporter of Transmission Products and Machinery Parts since 1996. Gear Rack, Rack & Pinion, Timing Pulley, V Belt Pulley, Bevel Gear, Taper Lock, Industrial Gears. Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.

item.title: Products — Prarthana Industries
item.description: Prarthana Industries product catalogue — Bevel Gear, Chain Coupling, Customised Parts, Food Machining Parts, Geneva, Helical Gear, Industrial Gear, Industrial Sprockets, Rack and Pinion, Spiral Bevel Gear, Spiral Jaw Clutch Coupling, Taper Lock Bush Weld Hub and QD Bush, Taper Lock Pulley, Timing Pulley, V Belt Pulley, V Groove Pulley. Manufacturer and exporter, Ahmedabad India.

item.title: Contact — Prarthana Industries
item.description: Contact Prarthana Industries — Get a quote for precision transmission components. 45, Khodiyar Estate, Ahmedabad, India.

item.title: Product Detail — Prarthana Industries
item.description: Detailed product information — Prarthana Industries, manufacturer and exporter of precision transmission components, Ahmedabad, India.

item.title: About Us — Prarthana Industries
item.description: About Prarthana Industries — Manufacturer and Exporter of Gear Rack, Rack & Pinion, Timing Pulley, Bevel Gear, V Belt Pulley and Taper Lock Products. Established 1996, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Exporting to South-East Asia, Middle East, Europe and more.

item.title: Prarthana Industries — Manufacturer & Exporter of Transmission Products
item.description: Prarthana Industries — Manufacturer and Exporter of Transmission Products and Machinery Parts since 1996. Gear Rack, Rack & Pinion, Timing Pulley, V Belt Pulley, Bevel Gear, Taper Lock, Industrial Gears. Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.
